summary: Iteration 15 — Support Desk (14 endpoints + 8 pages) and Legacy Reports (11 endpoints + hub + 11 pages) end-to-end verified. 28/28 backend pytest PASS. Frontend: all 8 SD pages and all 11 LR pages render with seeded data, hub shows 24 cards across 3 sections (SUMMARY/DETAILED/CAMPAIGN ROI), sidebar exposes all 9 new testids (nav-sd-* x8 + nav-legacy-reports). Write flow e2e validated: deactivate → list contains → reactivate → list contains → unsubscribe(sms) → unsubscribed list has channel=sms → resubscribe(all). Audit Log page shows resulting support_desk.* entries (customer_deactivate / customer_reactivate / unsubscribe / resubscribe) with reason metadata. CSV export from /legacy-reports/customer-data returns text/csv with proper Mobile header.

issues: React hydration warning logged once on /admin: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Source is a <Select>/<option> in the layout (likely the ALL stores/cities filter on Command Center). Non-blocking but should be fixed by replacing inline <span> inside <option> with plain text or using a custom dropdown. No functional impact observed.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Remove <span> child from <option> element in the city/store select component on AdminLayout/CommandCenter (suppresses React hydration warning).

OPTIONAL: feedback-data and expiry-points tables render 0 rows because the seed has no nps_responses with feedback and no points_ledger.expires_at in next 60 days. Consider seeding 2-3 of each so the UI demos non-empty states.
critical_code_review_comments: support_desk_routes.py:32-41 — _norm_mobile accepts 7+ digit shorts to support legacy 9-digit numbers; correct but logged as documented behavior.
support_desk_routes.py:264-288 — customer-deactivate guards on is_active is False (already deactivated → 400). Good.

support_desk_routes.py:206-254 — reactivate-redeem-points inserts a compensating ledger AND restores points_balance + adjusts lifetime_points_redeemed. Net effect is correct but balance double-update would be a risk if any future job recomputes from ledger. Safe today.

support_desk_routes.py:444-464 — audit-log filters action with regex '^support_desk\.' and additional 'action' regex if provided. NOTE: the second filter overwrites the first (single key in dict) — verified by test, but a future maintainer might expect both to apply. Consider $and: [...] for correctness; doesn't affect current tests because all support_desk.* match the additional sub-regex.

legacy_reports_routes.py:229-286 — fraud-report rapid-fire heuristic groups by mobile + hour-bucket (first 13 chars of bill_date). Will produce 3 flags from seed (verified). Large-redemption pulls $lte: -10000; correct because redeem entries are stored as negative points.
legacy_reports_routes.py:84-128 — customer-data CSV export streams properly with text/csv header.
legacy_reports_routes.py:381-413 — location-wise-customers joins to stores_col and post-filters by state/zone; correct approach, slightly inefficient at scale but fine for 11 stores.
Frontend coverage observed: all 8 SD page headings exact match expectation; LegacyReportsHub renders 24 cards (5+12+7), 3 section labels visible.

AdminLayout exposes nav-sd-rpo, nav-sd-rco, nav-sd-rac, nav-sd-rrp, nav-sd-deact, nav-sd-react, nav-sd-unsub, nav-sd-audit, nav-legacy-reports — all 9 present in DOM (confirmed via document.querySelectorAll).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 8/8 SD pages, 11/11 LR pages, hub 24 cards, sidebar 9/9 testids, write/audit e2e ✓, CSV export ✓

seed_data_creation: During the e2e flow tests a customer (mobile picked from /legacy-reports/customer-data row 1, e.g., 88881000... in seed) was deactivated, reactivated, unsubscribed(sms), resubscribed(all). All 4 actions logged to audit_logs_col with prefix support_desk.* and reason='TEST iter15 *'. Frontend Audit Log page shows them.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login route is /enterprise/login (NOT /login or /admin/login — those redirect to public marketing site). After login URL is /admin (no trailing path). Sidebar groups are collapsible — querying by testid via locator immediately after navigation can return 0 because of transient render; either await page.wait_for_timeout(1500) or query via document.querySelectorAll which works regardless of CSS visibility. Backend test seeds depend on the customer-deactivate test running before the dependent assertions — keep them in the TestSupportDeskWriteFlow class order. Fraud report seed produces exactly 3 rapid-fire flags.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — both new modules functioning correctly with no defects found.
